updates.title: Build Book Protocol & Theory Sync
updates.description: Implemented the full-screen immersive 'Build Book' (formerly Update Logs) and 'Build Theory' (formerly Architectural Theory). Integrated real-time synchronization of code state.
updates.rationale: Transitions the logs from a simple list to a prestigious technical protocol.

updates.title: Prestigious Front-Layer Particle Physics
updates.description: Relocated the neon orange live sparks to the front layer (Z-index 500) to float above content. Implemented high-entropy stable state randomization to prevent flickering.
updates.rationale: Achieves a high-fidelity 'WOW' factor that feels more prestigious and alive.

updates.title: Android Navigation Thumb Rule
updates.description: Engineered popstate history management. Android back gestures now close modals/books instead of exiting the app.
updates.rationale: Essential for native-feeling stability on mobile devices.

updates.title: Media Infrastructure Expansion (200MB)
updates.description: Expanded file limits to 200MB and enabled Zip/Rar/HTML/PDF support. Fixed Firestore undefined caption errors.
updates.rationale: Supports professional-grade file sharing within the Novario ecosystem.

updates.title: Honest Log: Glassmorphism realization
updates.description: While Glassmorphism was planned and partially implemented via backdrop blurs, a true 'Glassmorphism 2.0' (frosted glass with internal highlights) remains a conceptual goal and was never fully realized in the current build.
updates.rationale: Full transparency in the technical record is required for authentic development.

updates.title: Visual Identity & Doodle Layer
updates.description: Integrated the custom-engineered WhatsApp-inspired doodle background and real-time upload feedback.
updates.rationale: Enhances emotional connection and visual stability.
